## Modality x trait interaction (long-format weighted OLS)

- k observations: 42  
- tau^2 used in weights: 0.0105  
- reference cell: trait = O, modality = A  
- dropped modality levels (k<2): ['S']  

| Term | Estimate (Fisher z) | SE | t | p |
|------|--------------------:|---:|---:|---:|
| (Intercept) | 0.2383 | 0.0824 | 2.89 | 0.007 |
| trait[C] | -0.0521 | 0.1165 | -0.45 | 0.658 |
| trait[E] | -0.3418 | 0.1165 | -2.93 | 0.007 |
| trait[A] | 0.0835 | 0.1165 | 0.72 | 0.480 |
| trait[N] | -0.1707 | 0.1165 | -1.47 | 0.154 |
| modality[M] | -0.2665 | 0.1144 | -2.33 | 0.028 |
| modality[U] | -0.1694 | 0.1251 | -1.35 | 0.187 |
| trait[C]:modality[M] | 0.2370 | 0.1618 | 1.46 | 0.155 |
| trait[C]:modality[U] | 0.2204 | 0.1745 | 1.26 | 0.218 |
| trait[E]:modality[M] | 0.4349 | 0.1618 | 2.69 | 0.012 |
| trait[E]:modality[U] | 0.3140 | 0.1769 | 1.78 | 0.087 |
| trait[A]:modality[M] | 0.0264 | 0.1618 | 0.16 | 0.872 |
| trait[A]:modality[U] | -0.1840 | 0.1769 | -1.04 | 0.307 |
| trait[N]:modality[M] | 0.2011 | 0.1618 | 1.24 | 0.225 |
| trait[N]:modality[U] | 0.1251 | 0.1745 | 0.72 | 0.480 |

**Joint Wald test on interaction terms**: chi^2(8) = 14.267, p = 0.0751.

## Caveats

- Per-modality cell k is small (k = 1–4 per cell). The synchronous bucket has k = 1 and is reported narratively only.
- The interaction model uses a tau^2 estimate equal to the median of per-trait REML tau^2 estimates; this is an approximation in lieu of a full random-intercept mixed model and is reported as exploratory.
- The modality classification is derived from `data_extraction_populated.csv` via `inputs/derive_studies_csv.py::classify_modality`; ambiguous cases are recorded as 'U' (unspecified).
- Sensitivity scenarios are reported in `sensitivity.csv`.
